meaning: n.被拒之人,被弃之物,不合格品,落选者,不及格者vt.拒绝,抵制,否决,呕出,驳回,丢弃
examples: Animals reject the runt of the litter.
It lies with you to accept or reject the proposals.
Often a trial judge or appellate court will reject or reduce a steep verdict.
Some union leaders have warned they would reject deep job cuts among the group's 20, 000-strong workforce.
